goal: Persist raw operator audio per session for future feature-tier re-extraction. scripts/conduit_tui/operator_capture.py buffers AEC-cleaned mic chunks in memory and flushes to data/dataset/user/<iso_timestamp>.wav at session finalize. Wired into orchestrator._mic_pump (.append on every cleaned chunk) and conversation_screen.action_quit (.finalize on exit). Preserves raw 16kHz mono int16 PCM so Tier 1 (ONNX) and Tier 2 (distilled CNN) re-enrollment can extract their own features from the same audio without asking the operator to re-record.
